plan_adherence_notes: Execution matched the approved plan in this worktree. The runtime baseline was captured as Node v22.22.1 and pnpm 10.30.1. `pnpm --dir frontend install` completed without lockfile drift. The implementation then tightened the frontend runtime and test harness by opting the app and test routers into the React Router v7 future flags and by normalizing missing market-comment responses to an empty discussion payload, which removed the warning noise observed during the first clean test run. The full `pnpm --dir frontend test` suite then passed in this worktree, and an additional `pnpm --dir frontend build` sanity check also passed after the source changes.

commands.notes: Lockfile was already up to date and no tracked frontend dependency files changed.
TypeScript build and Vite production build both completed successfully.

reason: The frontend test suite now runs cleanly in a fresh worktree after dependency install, with no lockfile drift and no router or missing-comments warning noise in the Vitest output.
